Icicles hang from the rooftops, glistening in the sun.
The cold air stings my face as I walk outside.
Frost covers the windows in delicate patterns.
A snowstorm turns the city into a winter wonderland.
The fireplace crackles, filling the room with warmth.
Hot chocolate tastes best on a freezing winter day.
Snowflakes drift down gently from the gray sky.
The wind howls, making the winter night feel even colder.
